revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初五]][[zh:七月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初五]][[zh:七月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初五]][[zh:七月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初五]][[zh:七月初五]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 5|qq=July 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 5''' is the 5th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kanna (era)|en|Kanna (era)|qid=Q1327053|lt=Kanna|1=Kanna (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 12|en|August 12|qid=Q2777|lt=August 12|1=August 12}} , {{ill|986|en|986|qid=Q23785|lt=986|1=986}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Senshi|ja|藤原詮子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Senshi|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623548}} , known as {{ill|Higashi Sanjō-in|ja|東三条院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi Sanjō-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原詮子|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623548}} , was granted the title of {{ill|Empress dowager|en|Empress dowager|qid=Q7409248|lt=Kōtaigō|1=Empress dowager}} upon the accession of {{ill|Emperor Ichijō|en|Emperor Ichijō|qid=Q449540|lt=Emperor Ichijō|1=Emperor Ichijō}} . * Year 5 of {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|1194|en|1194|qid=Q19743|lt=1194|1=1194}} ) – In response to a petition from {{ill|Enryaku-ji|en|Enryaku-ji|qid=Q917195|lt=Enryaku-ji|1=Enryaku-ji}} , the government banned the {{ill|Zen|en|Zen|qid=Q7953|lt=Zen|1=Zen}} teachings of {{ill|Eisai|en|Eisai|qid=Q366128|lt=Eisai|1=Eisai}} and his followers. * Year 1 of [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 2|en|August 2|qid=Q2785|lt=August 2|1=August 2}} , {{ill|1394|en|1394|qid=Q6398|lt=1394|1=1394}} ) – Due to the spread of an {{ill|Contagious disease|en|Contagious disease|qid=Q2995419|lt=epidemic|1=Contagious disease}} , the era name was changed from {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|qid=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku|1=Meitoku}} to Ōei. * Year 18 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|qid=Q2784|lt=August 4|1=August 4}} , {{ill|1590|en|1590|qid=Q6764|lt=1590|1=1590}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Ujinao|en|Hōjō Ujinao|qid=Q1156668|lt=Hōjō Ujinao|1=Hōjō Ujinao}} surrendered {{ill|Odawara Castle|en|Odawara Castle|qid=Q1013437|lt=Odawara Castle|1=Odawara Castle}} to {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , marking the Completion tier 5]] ) – The {{ill|Fifth National Seclusion Decree|ja|第五次鎖国令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth National Seclusion Decree|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was issued, banning Portuguese ships from Japan and finalizing the shogunate’s control over foreign trade. * Year 3 of {{ill|Jōō (Edo period)|en|Jōō (Edo period)|qid=Q1145081|lt=Jōō|1=Jōō (Edo period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 17|en|August 17|qid=Q2827|lt=August 17|1=August 17}} , {{ill|1654|en|1654|qid=Q6970|lt=1654|1=1654}} ) – The Ming Dynasty Zen monk {{ill|Ingen|en|Ingen|qid=Q705266|lt=Yinyuan Longqi|1=Ingen}} arrived in Japan.
== Births == * Year 5 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}} , {{ill|1852|en|1852|qid=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}} ) – {{ill|Yabuki Shōun|ja|矢吹璋雲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yabuki Shōun|1=Yabuki Shōun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11584019}} , painter (d. {{ill|1927|en|1927|qid=Q18110|lt=1927|1=1927}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 3 of {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|qid=Q1194251|lt=Kenpō|1=Kempo (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 1|en|August 1|qid=Q2788|lt=August 1|1=August 1}} , {{ill|1215|en|1215|qid=Q5366|lt=1215|1=1215}} ) – {{ill|Eisai|en|Eisai|qid=Q366128|lt=Eisai|1=Eisai}} , founder of the {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|qid=Q639625|lt=Rinzai school|1=Rinzai school}} of Zen Buddhism (b. {{ill|1141|en|1141|qid=Q19613|lt=1141|1=1141}} ). * Year 7 of {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 11|en|August 11|qid=Q2778|lt=August 11|1=August 11}} , {{ill|1564|en|1564|qid=Q6632|lt=1564|1=1564}} ) – {{ill|Nagao Masakage|en|Nagao Masakage|qid=Q6958482|lt=Nagao Masakage|1=Nagao Masakage}} , {{ill|Sengoku period|en|Sengoku period|qid=Q204023|lt=sengoku period|1=Sengoku period}} warrior (b. {{ill|1526|en|1526|qid=Q6325|lt=1526|1=1526}} ). * Year 7 of Eiroku (Gregorian calendar August 11, 1564) – {{ill|Usami Sadamitsu|en|Usami Sadamitsu|qid=Q367392|lt=Usami Sadamitsu|1=Usami Sadamitsu}} , sengoku period warrior (b. {{ill|1489|en|1489|qid=Q6665|lt=1489|1=1489}} ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}} , {{ill|1809|en|1809|qid=Q6919|lt=1809|1=1809}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanori|ja|松平定則|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Sadanori|1=Matsudaira Sadanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10729408}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Iyo-Matsuyama Domain|en|Iyo-Matsuyama Domain|qid=Q1042087|lt=Iyo-Matsuyama Domain|1=Iyo-Matsuyama Domain}} (b. {{ill|1793|en|1793|qid=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|4|7|6|6|5|8|7|0705|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
